since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.98% · Gold +2.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.86%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.16%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.16%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +11.02%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +11.02%, META +8.74%, APP +7.77%, PLTR +6.87%, PATH +6.44%. Laggards: KLAC -7.68%, TER -7.64%, MU -6.86%, LRCX -6.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.25% at $161.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
